steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The defining signal is the contrast between the general trend and exceptions in the notes: most circumnavigations include stops on land (note 2) vs. the examples of nonstop circumnavigations by Liardet and Pajkowska (notes 4 and 6).

This contrast frames the generalization.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice C explicitly states the pattern from note 2 (most include stops) and contrasts it with the exceptions from the female sailors’ journeys (some are nonstop).

The other three either omit the contrast (D is a flat definition, A and B list examples without synthesis).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
